'''23 Mere''' was a colony [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="SoL">''[[Shield of Lies]]''</ref> situated in the [[23 Mere system/Legends|23 Mere system]] of the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]].<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> The ''[[Star Morning]]'' stopped at this world on its way to [[Motexx]] from [[Darepp]].<ref name="SoL" />

==Behind the scenes==
23 Mere was first mentioned in the novel ''[[Shield of Lies]]'', released in [[September]] [[1996]].<ref name="SoL" /> It received an entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', released on [[December 9]], [[2008]], which stated the planet was located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].<ref name=CSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> However, the reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', released on [[August 18]], [[2009]], placed 23 Mere in the Colonies,<ref name="TEA" /> as did ''[[Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion]]''.<ref name="TEAOC" />
